steps.title: Identify the key statement
steps.content: The opening sentence directly states what Bellie researches: “Musician and astronomer Darsan Swaroop Bellie researches gravitational waves.”

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: Choice B names exactly what the passage identifies as Bellie's research subject. The other three choices either do not appear in the text or describe Bellie's creative work rather than his research focus. That matches choice B — B is correct.
